title: Show Me Your Payload Name
description: Displays the name from minecraft:custom_payload when protocol error occurred.
body:
## Show Me Your Payload Name
Displays the name from minecraft:custom_payload when protocol error occurred.

![A disconnect screen with custom payload name displayed.A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64eaa758d3c603d307704d0e253bc5320c559e00.jpeg)
